message:
fix: extract structuredContent from MCP tool result envelope

MCP tools/call responses wrap tool outputs in an envelope with:
- structuredContent (preferred, already parsed)
- content[].text (fallback, JSON string)
- isError flag

Previously, callTool() returned the raw envelope, causing unmarshaling
to fail when parsing into domain types (e.g., Agent). Now we properly
extract the actual content.

Backward compatible: raw results without envelope pass through unchanged.

Closes #24

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
